title: dortmanna pinifolia
intro: Dortmanna pinifolia, also known as the pinecone or pinecone pine, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its unique pinecone-like cones and needle-like leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna pinifolia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and cones in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
